response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack and polyglot engineering experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with exposure to high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or A/B testing at scale — core requirements for this role. Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/IC6, and there is no evidence of multi-team platform leadership or statistical/experimental analysis work.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering across TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java with high-throughput service experience
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops/courses
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq aligns with AI-first engineering focus
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics platform building or statistical analysis at scale
Career level (Senior/Staff) and scope shown is below Principal/IC6 multi-team platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering fundamentals and longevity
